questions.question: What is staking?
options: Locking assets to participate in a blockchain network and potentially earn rewards

questions.question: Why do people stake assets?
options: To help secure networks and potentially earn rewards

questions.question: What is collateral in DeFi borrowing?
options: An asset pledged to secure a loan

questions.question: What can happen if collateral value drops too much?
Who are liquidity providers?
options: People who contribute assets to liquidity pools

questions.question: What is yield farming?
options: Using DeFi systems to earn rewards from activities such as liquidity provision

questions.question: What is impermanent loss?
options: A risk associated with providing liquidity when asset prices change

questions.question: What is diversification?
options: Putting all funds into one opportunity
Spreading exposure across multiple assets or strategies

questions.question: According to this module, what should participants consider before rewards?
